# NPEDATA — Nigerian Public Economic Data Aggregation and Analytics Platform with Open API

## Summary
NPEDATA aggregates Nigerian public economic data from the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), the National
Bureau of Statistics (NBS), and the World Bank into one interactive dashboard, with a free, open,
no-authentication REST API for programmatic and AI-agent access. Final Year Project, Department of
Computer Science, Caleb University, Imota, Lagos, Nigeria (2026). Author: Taoheed Abdulmanan Olaosebikan.

Scope is strictly Nigeria — no other countries' data is included.

## Links
- Live dashboard: https://antd-cr7.github.io/nigerian-dashboard
- Open API base URL: https://npedata-api.onrender.com
- Source code: https://github.com/ANTD-CR7/nigerian-dashboard
- API status / data freshness: https://antd-cr7.github.io/nigerian-dashboard/status.html

## Data
- 12,100 records across 122 indicators, sourced from CBN, NBS and World Bank publications.
- Primary case-study period: 2020–2026. Select series (CBN Five-Year Financial Statement, Currency in
  Circulation, GDP by sector) extend back to 1960/1981/2002.
- Deduplicated, date-normalised to ISO 8601, reconciled against original source files (see /about.html
  on the dashboard for the data-audit disclosure).

## Open API
Base URL: https://npedata-api.onrender.com
Auth: none. Method: GET only. CORS: open. Format: JSON.

Endpoints (all under /api/v1/):
- GET /summary                  — latest value for GDP, inflation, exchange rate, MPR, FX reserves.
- GET /gdp                      — quarterly real GDP growth (%) and annual nominal GDP (USD billions).
- GET /inflation                — monthly headline, food and core inflation (% YoY).
- GET /exchange-rate            — monthly average NGN/USD official rate.
- GET /interest-rate            — CBN Monetary Policy Rate (MPR) per MPC decision.
- GET /fx-reserves               — monthly gross, liquid and blocked FX reserves + block percentage.
- GET /currency-circulation      — currency in circulation (NGN billions), 2002–2024.
- GET /nfem                     — NFEM daily closing, highest, lowest, weighted-average rates.
- GET /multicurrency             — buying/central/selling rates for 11 currencies vs the Naira.
- GET /gdp-sectors               — real GDP by sector (agriculture, industry, services, etc).
- GET /cbn-balance-sheet          — CBN total assets, liabilities, gold, currency issued.
- GET /analytics                 — Pearson correlation between inflation and exchange rate.

Most endpoints accept optional `start`/`end` date query params (ISO 8601, e.g. 2020-01-01).
Interactive Swagger docs: https://npedata-api.onrender.com/docs

## AI Agent Access
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server is available in the repository at /mcp-server, exposing every
endpoint above as a read-only tool for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible clients. See
mcp-server/README.md in the source repository for setup.

## License / Usage
Free for research, academic, and development use. Data is for informational and educational purposes
only and does not constitute financial advice. For official figures, refer directly to the CBN, NBS,
and World Bank.
